data.body: Update the shipped Knots SDLC Loom workflow so profile structure, phases, and prompts reflect actual delivery modes. In particular, no-PR flows should not pretend there is a separate PR-shaped review artifact, and review/shipment semantics should line up with whether the reviewer is expected to inspect a branch, a PR, code already merged to main, or code already live. Preserve human-gated variants and keep profile behavior explicit and testable.
data.title: Redesign built-in SDLC profiles to match delivery reality
